help.why: When provided, the model uses this instead of inventing stories, offers, tags, or social proof. Empty fields stay unset ([searchPhrase]).
help.example: A short, factual value for search phrase you can verify before publishing on Instagram.
help.avoid: Fake urgency, invented personal stories, engagement bait, or unverified product claims for search phrase.
